# brevo_domain (Resource)

Manages a sender domain in Brevo.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Domain name to register with Brevo.

### Read-Only

- `brevo_code` (String) Brevo verification code TXT record value.
- `dkim_record_1` (String) DKIM CNAME record value (first key).
- `dkim_record_2` (String) DKIM CNAME record value (second key).
- `id` (Number) Numeric identifier of the domain.
- `verified` (Boolean) Whether the domain has been verified.
